extension.summary: Import widget backups and preloaded setups.
extension.description: Downloads or opens a widget backup ZIP, imports Skin Shortcuts XML or Arctic Fuse 3 Skin Variables shortcut JSON into the active skin profile, offers preloaded AF3 and AH2 setup imports, keeps a separate source importer for URLs and ZIPs, optionally retargets Fen-style paths to another video add-on, and creates a restore backup before overwriting anything.
